sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">MAMA = Monumenta Asiae Minoris Antiqua,</title_> vol. i, ed. W. M. Calder, Manchester-London 1928 (Publications of the American Society for Archaeological Research in Asia Minor); vol. iii, ed. J. Keil & A. Wilhelm, 1931; vol. iv, ed. W. H. Buckler, W. M. Calder, W. K. C. Guthrie, 1933; vol. v, ed. C. W. M. Cox & A. Cameron, 1937; vol. vi, ed. W. H. Buckler & W. M. Calder, 1939 (iii-vi Manchester).</item>
